title: notifications-mail — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: Per-provider send + delivery + bounce + cost metrics.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.deliveries.by_state_total
metrics.description: state: delivered / opened / clicked / bounced / complained / failed. Fed from webhook ingest.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.bounces.by_kind_total
metrics.description: kind: hard / soft. Hard bounces increment suppression.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.suppressions.gauge
metrics.description: Active MailSuppression rows by reason. Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.suppressions.hit_rate_ratio
metrics.description: % of dispatch attempts refused by suppression check. Healthy tenant: < 5%. High = deliverability problem.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.cost_micro_units.total
metrics.description: Cost aggregation. SES has near-zero cost; SendGrid tier-based; Mailgun per-email.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.mail.render.duration_ms
metrics.description: Blade render time on the pre-rendered React Email HTML. Should stay < 5ms P99.
